title: 邂逅する想慕【ミラージュメモリー】

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking around the campus when I hear a
familiar voice.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: And so, peace was restored throughout the land.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... The performance still feels a little too
by-the-book.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ah—Trainer. We've been asked to put on a play
for the local children.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's gonna be a heroic legend, RPG-style! We're
practicing hella hard!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Since we've been put in charge, I want to do a
good job, but it seems we've played it too safe.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Ooh! I know! At the end, I could do a flyin'
body press!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... I think not, El. Are you trying to set a
dangerous example for the children?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ow, ow, ow! Okay, okay! I get it already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them continue their rehearsal for some
time after.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Whew... Writing an entertaining script is hard
work.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we simplify the lines a little more?
Let's start again from the top.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Again?! Nggghhh... You sure are givin' it your all,
Grass.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Of course. The experiences children have in their
formative years are extremely important.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
When I myself was young, I was always moved
and inspired by the emphasis on precision within
Japanese culture.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I want this play of ours to provoke the same type
of response.
choice_data_list: It will, I'm sure of it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Well, of course I want that too! I wanna make 'em
feel like I did seein' luchadores when I was little!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Then why don't we do another
read-through? Trainer, if you would play the
antagonist...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their rehearsals continue every day until the big
day of the show is here.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Argh... They don't call ya the Demon Lord for
nothin'... Gotta hand it to ya... That was a good
hit...
choice_data_list: Bwah hah hah! And now, for the final blow!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Waaaahhh! Don't give up! Beat that Demon Lord
up!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Indeed... We cannot afford to lose. Too many
people are counting on us.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: This is for them! Angelic Bolt!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hiyaaah! Shrieking Condor Wave!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Yaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
You were so cool! Next time something scary
happens, I'm gonna be brave too!

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text:
Me too! I'm gonna be like a hero and never lose!
Man, I wanna see that play again!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that so? Hehehe. Thank you. I'm glad you
enjoyed the show.
choice_data_list: Looks like your hard work paid off.
Looks like your hard work paid off.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that so? Hehehe. Thank you. I'm glad you
enjoyed the show.
choice_data_list: Looks like your hard work paid off.
Looks like your hard work paid off.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes, and yours as well, Trainer. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Not only was your advice invaluable, but your
performance as the antagonist is what made our
play such a success.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Hey! Hey! Let's do that last part together!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Okay! ...This is for them! Angel Bolt!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I guess it's our turn to watch.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It can be our quest reward, like in a video
game. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The children in the audience thoroughly enjoyed
the play.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
What? I would understand if this were a concert,
but an encore for a play?

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Pleeease! Encore! Encore!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Well, if you're going to insist.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
How about it, Trainer? Shall we finish strong
today?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We perform the highlights one more time, and the
curtain closes on a great show.
